description: Complete a construction bid estimate in WPS Spreadsheet using /home/ga/Documents/residential_takeoff.xlsx. On the 'Project_Takeoff' sheet, populate 'Description' (Column D) and 'CSI_Division' (Column E) using the 'Master_Price_Book' sheet. Calculate 'Adj_Material_Qty' (Column F) by applying the 'Waste_Factor_Pct' to the 'Plan_Quantity'. Determine 'Mat_Cost_Total' (Column G) and 'Lab_Cost_Total' (Column H) using unit costs from the price book, applying the waste factor only to material costs. Calculate the 'Line_Total' (Column I) for each item. Create a new sheet named 'Bid_Summary' that summarizes total costs by unique CSI_Division. The summary must include a subtotal, a 15% 'Overhead & Profit' markup, and the Final Total Bid Price. Format all cost columns as Currency ($) and save the spreadsheet.
